items.title: Kremlin Aide Says 1 Side Unable to Fulfill Anchorage Accords
items.desc: MOSCOW (Sputnik) - One of the parties to the agreements reached at the US-Russia summit in the Alaskan city of Anchorage in August 2025 has proven unable to fully implement them, Kremlin aide Yuri Ushakov said in an interview out on Sunday.
